title: Single-cell analyses identify the ginseng embryonic protoderm as a native compartment for high-efficiency ginsenoside production
author: Zhai, Ning
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Processed single-cell RNA sequencing UMI matrix and related R scripts were provided for "Single-cell analyses identify the ginseng embryonic protoderm as a native compartment for high-efficiency ginsenoside production" published on Nature Communications.
steps_raw: Processed single-cell RNA sequencing UMI matrix and related R scripts were provided for "Single-cell analyses identify the ginseng embryonic protoderm as a native compartment for high-efficiency ginsenoside production" published on Nature Communications.
